items.name: Travel Map
items.description: Use the map to travel by dropping it anywhere on the screen.

items.name: Flower
items.description: A pretty daisy from the lake. Lily might like this.

items.name: Postcard
items.description: A postcard of the painting from the Louvre. Marcus might recognize it.

items.name: Magnifying Glass
items.description: A magnifying glass for examining things closely.

items.name: Golden Artifact
items.description: A mysterious golden artifact.

items.name: Comic Book
items.description: A colorful comic book.

items.name: Letter
items.description: A sealed letter.

items.name: Fishing Rod
items.description: A fishing rod from the lake.

items.name: Coin Rubbing
items.description: A pencil rubbing of an ancient coin from the Jerusalem tunnels.

items.name: Pressed Sakura
items.description: A cherry blossom, pressed flat between temple parchment.

items.name: Dance Card
items.description: Half of a carnival dance card. The other half is... somewhere else.

items.name: Inscription Rubbing
items.description: A rubbing taken from a Roman monument - the letters still smell of chalk.

items.name: Rolling Pin
items.description: Madame Poulain's wooden rolling pin. She'll be relieved to have it back.

items.name: Baguette
items.description: A crusty Parisian baguette, still warm. Smells incredible.

items.name: Press Pass
items.description: A photographer's press pass. Should grant museum access.

items.name: Museum Ticket
items.description: A ticket into the Louvre. Don't lose it.

items.name: Cafe au Lait
items.description: A cream porcelain cup of steaming Parisian coffee. Henri is waiting for this.

items.name: Confiture
items.description: Henri's homemade strawberry confiture. Smells incredible - Pierre might like it on his dry baguette.

items.name: Charcoal Pencil
items.description: Camille's lucky charcoal pencil, fished out of the flower pot by the Louvre steps. Worn flat on one side from years of sketching.

items.name: Camille's Sketch
items.description: Camille's charcoal replica of the Room 7 portrait, signed. Curator Beaumont wants it for the archive wall.

items.name: Baguette Heel
items.description: Yesterday's baguette heel from Madame Poulain. The ends are for the birds anyway.

items.name: Mini Portrait
items.description: A tiny oil portrait of PP by Pierre, approved by the toughest critic in Paris - a pigeon.

items.name: Signed Postcard
items.description: A second Louvre postcard, signed by Curator Beaumont. Madame Poulain's grandson in Lyon collects these.

items.name: Cardamom
items.description: A pinch of green cardamom pods (Elettaria cardamomum) from the souk - the secret to a proper Jerusalem coffee.

items.name: Coffee
items.description: A tiny cup of thick, cardamom-spiced coffee from the souk. Strong enough to wake the stones.

items.name: Bagel
items.description: A fresh sesame ka'ak - the long oval Jerusalem street bagel, still warm.

items.name: Note Paper
items.description: A small slip of paper from the praying man at the Wall. You're meant to write a wish on it and tuck it in the stones.

items.name: Pen
items.description: A simple pen from Shimon by the gate. For the note.

items.name: Coin
items.description: An old coin Shimon pressed into your paw after you left your note in the Wall. A memory of this place - and exactly the face from Jake's dream.

items.name: Well-Water
items.description: A cup of cool water drawn from the temple well in the Kyoto street. Kenji needs it to wet his dried ink.

items.name: Voice Charm
items.description: A little paper charm Kenji brushed with the kanji for 'voice'. He said a quiet heart should carry one.

items.name: Fire-Striker
items.description: Hiro's flint fire-striker - a crow stole it and dropped it in Oba-chan's eaves. The ramen hearth is cold without it.

items.name: Offering Bowl
items.description: A bowl blessed at Hiro's hearth, still warm. An offering for the old cherry tree in the grove.

items.name: Matcha
items.description: A tin of bright-green matcha powder from the flower store's tea shelf. The tea master will want this.

items.name: Tea Bowl
items.description: A chawan picked from the shelf - never the same one twice. Empty, for now.

items.name: Matcha Bowl
items.description: Matcha whisked with cool well-water into a froth. Ready to share with the tea master.
